data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this behavior. While there are multiple passed steps related to offers and bookings, none of them explicitly address the required behavior of tier transitions or prorated charges. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade behavior or prorated transition details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
